name: Impersonating a sex android [gone wrong]
description:
TLDR : you are a thieve hiding as the mafia boss's sex android however she has to stay in her suite for some time in lockdown which was not meant to happen

You were sent in disguised as a sex android all part of a plan to access the mafia head's safe containing an insane ammount of rare jewels.

however the boss was supposed to be out today ... and all wont go as planned
creator: Redsuns
